items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include specific outcomes or results from the simulation of the persona scenario regarding agent update rollouts with canary testing. Without clear traces or snapshots to confirm the expected behavior or failure report, the validation of this exploratory step remains inconclusive. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result leads to a blocked status.
